name: socraticode
description: Codebase intelligence: semantic search workflows, dependency graph analysis, and context artifact exploration for SocratiCode

interface.shortDescription: Codebase intelligence: semantic search, dependency graphs, and context artifacts
interface.longDescription: SocratiCode provides codebase intelligence through semantic search workflows, dependency graph analysis, and context artifact exploration. Index your codebase, search with hybrid semantic + keyword search, visualize module dependencies, and manage context artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use SocratiCode to search the codebase for authentication handling.
Use SocratiCode to visualize the dependency graph of this project.
